title: rosa urbica f. subglabra
intro: Rosa urbica f. subglabra, also known as the Rosa subglabra, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Rosa subglabra has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Rosa subglabra include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health issues.
